{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":420},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7561363578874086169","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得相当有趣呀，虽然是普遍的跟船流，但主角的参与度挺不错的，看样子是无敌旅行跟船流，看甘雨这架势是要成为团宠呀，新人作者也能写这么好相当难得呀。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760520752,"group_id":"7532138420697566233","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9pBvjqQykwSNGqc+8JBSJo=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a731640a1e284084b06f3ddbd50fa765~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706042&x-signature=t5DGYZd3UiHQkw3fLuv6NoIkuHg%3D","user_id":"910048693068669","user_name":"苏打可乐猫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"910048693068669","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7532138420697566233","book_info":{"abstract":"【变单+跟船+无系统】
从东海篇章开始，加入主角团后依旧会按照原著剧情线走，主线剧情不会更改，但每一个小篇章会根据主角加入后带来的蝴蝶效应而适当改变（其中绝大部分对话都是我自己编写的，不会按照原著来）。
甘雨的实力一开始不是无敌，后面会逐渐恢复，不过一直都是船上最强的，但她出手次数不会很多。
本文内容偏轻松，尽量贴合原著风格，快节奏，战斗加日常对话交流。

3},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7565155980751700761","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还行，跟船流，不是真的甘雨，其实我认为真的甘雨穿了，那就不好看了。毕竟俩不是一个世界的，还要控制角色不要OOC还要有自己的发挥。给四星是因为怎么感觉和路飞，索隆肢体接触太好亲密，而且有点无脑跟路飞了。回想一下海贼发现，和后期娜美行为很像，虽然很海贼，但你这里套了个甘雨的模子，这样写感觉真的不好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761402642,"group_id":"7532138420697566233","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"589815818498120"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7532138420697566233","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"47"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5498,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7564428249536643865","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好，只是套了甘雨的面板，并不是甘雨，剧情大致是跟着主线走，也有不少原创，挺有意思的，没有啥OOC，对甘雨的战力也有标准的划分，不会让主角团成长不起来（很好奇到了香波地群岛要怎样才能不偏离主线）加油，速更[舔屏]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761232764,"group_id":"7532138420697566233","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nyy5r3Jmr8ERPL4kYkbZyUU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4ce70d3fa6c9406690ba1efdb285a6d7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707839&x-signature=K4BN%2FHmdZgmm2R1YO4ci0qgTsHw%3D","user_id":"589815818498120","user_name":"救世英桀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"589815818498120","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7532138420697566233","book_info":{"abstract":"【变单+跟船+无系统】

"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7562224202579346201","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"题材新颖，主角甘雨，不影响主线，无战力崩坏（不同世界穿越低级文章的通病），融入合理，本人看了不下20本为自己爽而写且精神疯癫，这本书对我来说可以算同人中排前几的了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760719807,"group_id":"7532138420697566233","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2ed/soUCUQjQYxNaxVScYE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a75c0ebf1c7046a2a3e5bab93ea598ce~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706346&x-signature=Rdt9gDuiBagYc3DvV6A4IFBLjcU%3D","user_id":"515012119765565","user_name":"取名好难4"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"515012119765565","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7532138420697566233","book_info":{"abstract":"【变单+跟船+无系统】
从东海篇章开始，加入主角团后依旧会按照原著剧情线走，主线剧情不会更改，但每一个小篇章会根据主角加入后带来的蝴蝶效应而适当改变（其中绝大部分对话都是我自己编写的，不会按照原著来）。
甘雨的实力一开始不是无敌，后面会逐渐恢复，不过一直都是船上最强的，但她出手次数不会很多。

从东海篇章开始，加入主角团后依旧会按照原著剧情线走，主线剧情不会更改，但每一个小篇章会根据主角加入后带来的蝴蝶效应而适当改变（其中绝大部分对话都是我自己编写的，不会按照原著来）。
甘雨的实力一开始不是无敌，后面会逐渐恢复，不过一直都是船上最强的，但她出手次数不会很多。
